result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 10:   JOIN period p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH period AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  -- each owner change contributes 1 transfer count to the old owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  -- agents that appear as either old or new owner in owner assignments during period
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH period AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt, TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.end_dt
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  -- each owner change contributes 1 transfer count to the old owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  -- agents that appear as either old or new owner in owner assignments during period
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH period AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT regexp_replace(h.agent_id, '^#', '') AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH period AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) LIKE 'owner%'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(created_ts) AS min_ts, MAX(created_ts) AS max_ts
FROM assignments;

  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) LIKE 'owner%'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(created_ts) AS min_ts, MAX(created_ts) AS max_ts
FROM assignments;

args.query:
WITH period AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) LIKE 'owner%'
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN old_owner IS NULL OR btrim(old_owner)='' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS old_blank,
  SUM(CASE WHEN new_owner IS NULL OR btrim(new_owner)='' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_blank,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM assignments;

    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,

  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) LIKE 'owner%'
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN old_owner IS NULL OR btrim(old_owner)='' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS old_blank,
  SUM(CASE WHEN new_owner IS NULL OR btrim(new_owner)='' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_blank,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM assignments;

args.query:
WITH period AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) LIKE 'owner%'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS transfer_events
FROM assignments
WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner)<>'';

), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt

SELECT COUNT(*) AS transfer_events
FROM assignments
WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner)<>'';

args.query:
WITH period AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) LIKE 'owner%'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT regexp_replace(h.agent_id,'^#','') AS "Id",
       COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count,
       h.cases_handled
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 20;

  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT regexp_replace(h.agent_id,'^#','') AS "Id",
       COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count,
       h.cases_handled
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 20;
